---
title: "Powell Elevation Projection"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Load Libraries
install.packages("ggplot2")

library("ggplot2")




## Set Current Storage: All data from https://usbr.gov/uc/water/hydrodata/reservoir_data/919/dashboard.html#csv/
storage <- read.csv("Storage.csv")
storage$datetime <- as.Date(storage$datetime)
current_storage <- storage[which.max(storage$datetime),]

# Set Inflows
inflow <- read.csv("Inflow.csv")
inflow_proj <- data.frame(inflow$ESP.Min, inflow$ESP.Most, inflow$ESP.Max, as.Date(inflow$datetime, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))
names(inflow_proj)[4] <- "datetime"

# Add DROA Flaming Gorge Releases (high = 1 maf, low = .660 maf)
fg_release <- read.csv("Flaming Gorge DROA Release.csv")
fg_release$datetime <- as.Date(fg_release$datetime, format = "%m/%d/%Y")
inflow <- merge(inflow_proj, fg_release, by = "datetime", all = T)
inflow <- inflow[order(inflow$datetime), ]

inflow$FG_High[is.na(inflow$FG_High)] <- 0
inflow$FG_Low[is.na(inflow$FG_Low)] <- 0
inflow$high <- inflow$inflow.ESP.Most +inflow$FG_High
inflow$low <- inflow$inflow.ESP.Most + inflow$FG_Low
inflow$high_10 <- inflow$inflow.ESP.Min + inflow$FG_High
inflow$low_10<- inflow$inflow.ESP.Min + inflow$FG_Low

# Define Inflow Projection (Currently Based on median flow)
inflow_high_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow$datetime),inflow$high)
inflow_low_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow$datetime),inflow$low)
inflow_old_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow$datetime), inflow$inflow.ESP.Most)
inflow_high_10_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow$datetime), inflow$high_10)
inflow_low_10_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow$datetime), inflow$low_10)

# Set Releases (Currently Based on Median Flow)
outflow <- read.csv("Outflow.csv")
outflow_proj <- data.frame(outflow$ESP.Min, outflow$ESP.Most, as.Date(outflow$datetime, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))
names(outflow_proj)[3] <- "datetime"
outflow_old_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(outflow_proj$datetime), outflow_proj$outflow.ESP.Most)

# Factor in Lowered releases 
# Outflow Left in 2026 = 6 - 3.6 = 2.4 MAF
# Projected Outflow Left in 2026 = 3.308 MAF
# Percent reduction in outflow = 2.4/3.308
# New Projected Outflow = Old Outflow * 2.4/3.308
outflow_proj$new <- outflow$ESP.Most * 2.4/3.308
outflow_new_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(outflow_proj$datetime), outflow_proj$new)


# Set Evaporation
# Evaporation is in acre feet per year
evap_data <- read.csv("dfPowellEvap.csv")


# Define Evaporation Approximation
evap_fun <- approxfun(evap_data$Total.Storage..ac.ft., evap_data$EvapVolMaxLo/12)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Interpolate into Time Series by Month
time_grid <- seq(from = (current_storage$datetime), to = as.Date("2027-10-01"), by = "month")
time_num <- as.numeric(time_grid)

inflow_high_i <- inflow_high_fun(time_num)
inflow_low_i <- inflow_low_fun(time_num)
inflow_old_i <- inflow_old_fun(time_num)
inflow_high_10_i <- inflow_high_10_fun(time_num)
inflow_low_10_i <- inflow_low_10_fun(time_num)
outflow_new_i <- outflow_new_fun(time_num)
outflow_old_i <- outflow_old_fun(time_num)

sum(inflow$inflow.ESP.Min[inflow$dateti])

# Set Up Dataframe
df<- data.frame(datetime = time_grid, inflow_high = inflow_high_i, inflow_low = inflow_low_i, inflow_old = inflow_old_i, inflow_high_10 = inflow_high_10_i, inflow_low_10 = inflow_low_10_i, outflow_new = outflow_new_i, ouflow_old = outflow_old_i)
start_idx <- which.min(abs(df$datetime - current_storage$datetime))

# Storage Projection Function: 
# Storage = Previous Storage + Inflow - Outflow - Evaporation
# Evaporation per timestep = Evaporation per year/365*days in time step
project_storage <- function(inflow, outflow)
{

  storage <- numeric(length(time_grid))
  storage[1] <- current_storage$storage
  
  for (i in 2:length(time_grid)) {
  evap_i <- evap_fun(storage[i-1])
  
  storage[i] <-
      storage[i - 1] +
      inflow[i] -
      outflow[i] -
      evap_i

  }
  elev <- sapply(storage, function(x){
    evap_data$Elevation..ft.[which.min(abs(x - evap_data$Live.Storage..ac.ft.))]
    })
  data.frame( datetime = time_grid, storage = storage, elevation = elev)
  
}


project_old <- project_storage(inflow_old_i, outflow_old_i)
project_high<- project_storage(inflow_high_i, outflow_new_i)
project_low <- project_storage(inflow_low_i, outflow_old_i)
project_high_10 <- project_storage(inflow_high_10_i, outflow_new_i)
project_low_10 <- project_storage(inflow_low_10_i, outflow_new_i)
project_old$label <- "Pre April 2026 Projections"
project_high$label <- "1 MAF release from Flaming Gorge"
project_low$label <- "0.660 MAF release from Flaming Gorge"
project_high_10$label <- "1 MAF release from Flaming Gorge"
project_low_10$label <- "0.660 MAF release from Flaming Gorge"

project_mid <- rbind(project_old, project_high, project_low)
project_low <- rbind(project_high_10, project_low_10, project_old)


# Figure 1: Projected Elevations
ggplot(project_mid, 
        aes(x = datetime, y = elevation, color = label)) + 
        geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
        labs(title = "Lake Powell Elevation Projections Median Inflow", x = "Date", y =               "Elevation(ft.)")+
        geom_hline(yintercept = 3490, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
        geom_point(data = highlight, size = 2, color = "black") +
        geom_text( data = highlight, aes(label = round(elevation, 1)), vjust = -1)
       
        
    
    highlight <- project_mid[project_mid$datetime == "2026-10-01",]
    highlight_10 <- project_low[project_low$datetime == "2026-10-01",]
        
ggplot(project_low,
        aes(x = datetime, y = elevation, color = label)) + 
        geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
        labs(title = "Lake Powell Elevation Projections Low Inflow", x = "Date", y =                  "Elevation(ft.)")+
        geom_hline(yintercept = 3490, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")+
        geom_point(data = highlight_10, size = 2, color = "black") +
        geom_text(data = highlight_10, aes(label = round(elevation, 1)), vjust = -2)
